meta.title: Tenu — Your deposit, checked in two minutes.
meta.description: Send us your move-out photos. Our AI tells you what your landlord can legally keep, and what must be refunded. From €15.

hero.title: Your landlord wants to keep part of your deposit?
hero.subtitle: Send your move-out photos. Our AI reads them in two minutes. It tells you what can legally be kept, and what cannot.
hero.pricePromise: From €15. You only pay if you run the scan.

trust.heading: Why this is safe to trust

data.title: Your photos never leave Europe
data.desc: Encrypted storage on Cloudflare EU. Deleted after twelve months. Never used to train AI.

law.title: Grounded in French housing law
law.desc: Our wear-and-tear scale is built on the official decree (arrêté du 19 mars 2020) and reviewed with a qualified housing lawyer.

honesty.title: We are not a law firm
honesty.desc: Tenu produces a template letter. You sign it. You send it. Tenants who use it recover part or all of their deposit.

example.label: Cases
example.heading: Two tenants. Two cities. The same mechanism.
example.intro: Each case is a composite drawn from tenant files we have seen. From May 2026 we publish outcome data from real disputes that closed, anonymised, with written consent.
example.disclaimer: Composite cases. Names fictitious, sums illustrative, legal references accurate as at 18 April 2026.

onboarding.title: Know your rights before you move in
onboarding.desc: Ten key legal facts about your French lease, in your language, from day one.

evidence.title: Evidence that holds up in mediation
evidence.desc: Timestamped room-by-room photos with verifiable chain of custody. Accepted by the French conciliation commission.

rights.title: Know what's deductible
rights.desc: The exact list of what your landlord can and cannot withhold from your deposit under French law.

scan.title: Two minutes to clarity
scan.desc: AI reads your photos and tells you, room by room, what is normal wear and what is not.

dispute.title: A letter that defends itself
dispute.desc: Letter in French, formatted to CDC standards, explained in your language. You sign, you send.

followup.title: Follow through to refund
followup.desc: After fourteen days we ask if your deposit was returned. Your answer helps the next tenant.

closing.heading: Two minutes to know where you stand.
closing.body: Upload your photos. Look at the preview. Pay €15 only if you choose to run the full scan.
closing.subnote: Secure Stripe checkout. Withdrawal right waived at purchase (art. L221-28 1° French Consumer Code).

scan.title: Risk Scan
scan.desc: AI-powered inspection report with room-by-room risk scoring.

dispute.title: Dispute Letter
dispute.desc: Formal dispute letter in French or English.

auth.magicLink: We'll send you a magic link
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
